name: TOiLET
short_description: A casual puzzle game. Go to the toilet, one must also strategize.
detailed_description:
A casual puzzle game.

  • Placing users in the urinal to achieve their goals
  • Avoiding the gaze of others
  • Using props to change the user's personality
  • Using props to change relationships between users
  • Using props to block line of sight
  • Make everyone happy

The gaze behind one's body, the malicious gaze, and the hat that greatly changes one's temperament are full of doubts and confusion. "Did you pee today?" seemed like a greeting, but secretly revealed an unknown secret

TOiLET! Exploring the hidden rules of using the restroom in the midst of joyful hustle and bustle, strategizing, meticulous, and meticulous, is the key to truly experiencing the exhilaration.

Break one's own shackles, get to know each other, enhance friendship, see the boundaries between people, and not become the hell of others.

Let's go to the toilet and go make fun of it!
